headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rally Won't Back Down, AMD Breaks Out; Netflix Dives Late
summary: The stock market kept rising Thursday even with oil pries rebounding. AMD led breakouts. Netflix and Alcoa tumbled late on earnings

headline: 3 Dividend Aristocrat ETFs to Buy Before 2026 Markets Shift
summary: Dividend growth investing rewards patience like few other strategies. The income stream compounds year after year, and the companies behind those dividends tend to be high-quality and structurally durable. With the Fed Funds rate at 3.75% and the 10-year Treasury yielding around 4.30%, dividend-focused equity funds must now compete against risk-free alternatives that offer meaningful ... 3 Dividend Aristocrat ETFs to Buy Before 2026 Markets Shift

headline: Why The Caterpillar (CAT) Narrative Is Shifting As Price Targets Rise And Cycle Risks Stay In Focus
summary: Caterpillar's modelled fair value has been updated to US$754.33 from US$742.18, a small upward move in the target level that many investors will notice. Recent Street research links higher targets like this to refreshed views on long term demand, digital efforts, and the construction cycle, while still flagging questions around valuation and cyclicality. As you read on, you will see how these shifting assumptions and commentaries are shaping the evolving Caterpillar narrative and what that...

headline: Caterpillar Continues to Crush the Magnificent 7 — Here’s How It Gets to $1,000
summary: U.S. factories just posted their strongest quarter in years, and the gains aren’t limited to flashy AI chips. Federal Reserve data released this morning shows manufacturing production excluding high-tech industries rose at a 2.4% annualized rate in Q1 — one of the healthiest paces since 2021. The rebound reached traditional sectors such as machinery, metals, ... Caterpillar Continues to Crush the Magnificent 7 — Here’s How It Gets to $1,000

headline: Caterpillar Inc. to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) will release first-quarter financial results at 5:30 a.m. CDT on Thursday, April 30. The full text of the release will be available at investors.caterpillar.com/financials/quarterly-results and on PR Newswire. The release will be furnished to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) via a Current Report on Form 8-K in compliance with applicable SEC rules.

headline: Nasdaq and Dow Jones futures show small gains as TSMC and Netflix earnings eyed
summary: US stocks are predicted to get off to a slow start on Thursday, after Wall Street saw various fresh record highs reached in the previous session. Nasdaq 100 futures were up 0.2%, with those for the Dow Jones and S&P 500 up 0.1%. A day earlier, the S&P climbed 0.8% to above 7,000...
